revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-3-485

Alternative terms: Grit blasting, Sand blasting

Method of cleaning a steel surface by projecting steel shot, grit, or sand on to it using a compressed air blast.

{{IALAFooter}}
